evidence: Recursive clone/scan has no byte, node, depth, or post-execution time budget; executor timeout ends before scanning.
No explicit size/depth/work limit exists in scan_result/redact_value.
proof_gap: Need deployed executor framing and service containment evidence; no defensive large-result test was run.

source: Oversized or deeply nested tool output.
closest_control: Executor timeout does not cover post-execution scanning.
sink_or_broken_control: Unbounded recursive scan/clone on the caller task.
impact: Potential agent-loop CPU, heap, or stack exhaustion.

preconditions: executor can return a large in-memory JSON value
